untranslatable_reason: Signal requires channel-normalized linearly-weighted moving average (CN(LMA(series, 4), N-days)) which is not available in the allowed indicators list. The closest available proxy is price_pos_20 (price position in 20-day channel), but this uses a different normalization method and lookback period. LMA (linearly weighted MA) is also not provided; only SMA and EMA variants are available.
translation_notes: Attempted mapping using price_pos_20 as a channel-normalized indicator proxy with threshold crossing logic. However, the original signal's specific transformation (4-day LMA normalized by 20-day channel) cannot be precisely replicated. The 1.5 ATR stop-loss is approximated as stop_loss_pct based on typical ATR values. Exit conditions use opposite threshold crosses as specified, with an added reversal confirmation using price direction.
